bird.name: Biak monarch
bird.summary: The Biak monarch (Symposiachrus brehmii), or Biak monarch flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Biak…

relations.subject: Biak monarch
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss; the Biak monarch's habitat is affected by clearing forests for agricultural use and by logging
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Biak monarch
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss; the Biak monarch's habitat is affected by clearing forests for agricultural use and by logging
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
